landingSubtitle: The broth is simmering, the lanterns are glowing, and the whole island has gathered for one delicious reason: it's your 26th birthday! Welcome to your very own Sabaw Festival, Dana!

guide.name: Bubbles
guide.title: Festival Committee President 🐢
guide.welcomeMessage: Dana! You made it! I'm Bubbles. The Festival Chef in the center is preparing a special birthday ramen for you, but he needs 5 essential ingredients from the 5 festival stops around the island. Visit them all to build your bowl!
guide.completionMessage: You've gathered all 5 ramen ingredients! The Festival Chef in the center is ready to cook you the ultimate birthday feast! 🍜✨
nudges: 2 ingredients left — the chef's getting hungry! 🍜
Look for the glowing stops on the map! Every stop holds an essential ingredient.
The chef in the center won't serve until you have all 5 ingredients. Keep exploring, birthday girl!
You REALLY like this stall, huh?

chef.name: Festival Chef
chef.title: Master Ramen Chef 👨‍🍳
chef.openingDialogue: Ahh, the birthday girl! 🍜 I've been simmering a special bowl just for you, Dana. But a great ramen needs great ingredients — and I'm fresh out! Help me gather them from around the festival, and I'll cook you the best birthday ramen of your life.
chef.missingDialogue: Smells like you're still missing a few things... keep going, birthday girl! [{collected} / 5 gathered]
chef.completionDialogue: You did it — every ingredient, gathered with love. Sit down. This one's all yours. 🍜
chef.finalePrompt:
Happy birthday, Dana. 🍜💛
Want to free roam and read everyone's messages again?

broth.name: Broth
broth.themeTieIn: our friendship simmering since day one
broth.completionMessage: Every memory adds flavor. Here's the broth — our friendship's been simmering since day one. 🍜
broth.sourceEcho: Broth — from your first day of school 🏫

noodles.name: Noodles
noodles.completionMessage: The whole festival's rooting for you. Take these noodles — the heart of every bowl.
noodles.sourceEcho: Noodles — the heart of every bowl from all your friends 🍜

ajitama.name: Ajitama (Marinated Egg)
ajitama.completionMessage: Perfectly seasoned. This ajitama is one of a kind — just like you.
ajitama.sourceEcho: Ajitama — perfectly seasoned and one of a kind 🌶️

chashu.name: Chashu Pork
chashu.completionMessage: Take some chashu from the fridge while you're here. But you're NOT moving in!

narutomaki.name: Narutomaki Topping
narutomaki.completionMessage: The stars gifted you this! ⭐ Narutomaki, on the house.
narutomaki.sourceEcho: Narutomaki — a glowing gift foretold by the stars ⭐

photos.caption: Innovation overture palang, wala ka ng ambag jk hbd!!
Abbie's kids first group photo? We don't know whats coming??

bloomBoard.subject: A message from Bernard ✉️
bloomBoard.content:
Happy Birthday Dana! You’re the friend I can always count on, and your passion for the Philippines shines in everything you do. Celebrate big! you deserve it 😊

— Bernard

bloomBoard.subject: A message from Chin 💌
bloomBoard.content:
Happy Birthday, Dana! 🥳 Thank you for always being just one message away. I wish you all the best in every aspect of your life. You were one of the first people I truly got along with here in school, and I hope that never changes even after MIB. I miss you and I hope to see you soon! Hugggss!!! ♥️

— Chin

bloomBoard.subject: A message from Jackie 💖
bloomBoard.content:
Happy, blessed birthday, Dana! Wishing you the happiest birthday ever, my favorite sexytary! Thank you so much for all the love, support, and positive energy you've shared with our cohort.. We truly appreciate everything you do.. Alam naman naming busy kang tao kasi ikaw na ang future President of the Philippines.. Char!

— Jackie

bloomBoard.subject: A message from Abbie 🌟
bloomBoard.content:
To Dana.... Happy Birthday to one of the highest paid Cohort of MIB2026b and the new face of AIM!! To have you as an LT Mate was a wish I had during overture. My wish came true immediately in Term1! (it was even multiplied by 3 and Topped with our #1 cohort during that LT).

— Abbie

bloomBoard.content: Happy Birthday Dana!! Watch this special video greeting from Otep!

messageBoard.subject: A message from Josh ✉️
messageBoard.content:
Happy birthday, Dana! Thank you for the friendship and all the help you’ve given these past few months. Your love for the Philippines is inspirational and I’m excited where God will take you in the future. Enjoy and take care always!

— Josh

messageBoard.subject: A message from Jai 💖
messageBoard.content:
Happy Birthday, Usec. Dana! Today’s most important agenda is ur birthday. I hope you get to take a well deserved break,breathe, & enjoy your special day. Maraming salamat for all that you do. Isa kang inspirasyon sa mga taga Brookshire. Cheers to another year of making a difference! 🫶🏻 woohoo 🫰🏼

— Jai

messageBoard.subject: A video message from Otep 🎬
messageBoard.content: Happy Birthday Dana!! Watch this special video greeting from Otep!

complimentBoard.subject: A compliment from Bernard ✨
complimentBoard.content:
“Dana is one of the prettiest faces I know. It matches how kind and dependable she is.”

— Bernard

complimentBoard.subject: A compliment from Chin 🌸
complimentBoard.content:
I feel how much she cares through her simple messages. She’s always there to listen whenever you need someone to talk to.

— Chin

complimentBoard.subject: A compliment from Jackie 💕
complimentBoard.content:
One of my favorite memories with you was during our Innovation Overture Week.. Ang saya ng chikahan at tsismisan natin, tapos pareho pa tayong nagulat na magkapit-barangay lang pala tayo! Small world talaga.. Since that day, you've stayed exactly the same.. genuine, kind, approachable, and unapologetically yourself.. That's one of the things I admire most about you.. Never lose that beautiful heart and authentic spirit.. Stay happy, healthy, blessed, and continue spreading good vibes wherever you go.. Keep it real, love and peace on Earth! Enjoy your special day, Dana! You deserve all the happiness, love, and blessings today and always.. Happy birthday! 🎉🎈🎁💐🎊🧧🎂

— Jackie

complimentBoard.subject: A compliment from Abbie 🌟
complimentBoard.content:
I was thinking that it would be a great learning opportunity to be working with this beautiful lady, who speaks very eloquently and one who always gives wise & meaningful insights.

— Abbie

complimentBoard.subject: A compliment from Josh ✨
complimentBoard.content:
Dana’s fashion sense is always on point and she’s a Steph Curry fan haha

— Josh

spiceRecipe.introText: The Compliment Board displays special notes from your friends sharing what they admire and love most about you, Dana!
spiceRecipe.hint: Tap each card to read what your friends think about you. Once all are read, the Ajitama egg will be yours!
spiceRecipe.successMessage: You are loved by everyone on this island!
spiceRecipe.tryAgainMessage: Read all the cards to claim your Ajitama!

danasHouse.introText: Dana approaches her cozy beach house. The mailbox flag is down, but the fridge inside is calling...
danasHouse.jokeDialogue: You're 26 — way too young to own a house. Go spend your money elsewhere! 😂 ...Fine, fine. Take some chashu from the fridge while you're here. But you're NOT moving in.

fortuneTent.introText: A mysterious purple tent stands at the edge of the festival grounds. Inside, the crystal ball glows brightly for the birthday girl.
fortuneTent.fortuneText: With Leo as both your Moon and Rising sign, the single biggest astrological event of this window lands squarely on you! Jupiter enters Leo on June 30, 2026 and stays until July 26, 2027, sitting directly on your Ascendant. This is described as a once-in-12-years 'Jupiter return' and one of the most visible, powerful, and personally transformative transits possible — so nearly everything this year is colored by it!

tabs.label: Overview 🌟
tabs.title: Once-in-12-Years Jupiter Return & TL;DR
tabs.content:
With Leo as both her Moon and Rising sign, the single biggest astrological event of this window lands squarely on her. Jupiter enters Leo on June 30, 2026 and stays until July 26, 2027, sitting directly on her Ascendant.

This is described as a once-in-12-years "Jupiter return" and one of the most visible, powerful, and personally transformative transits possible — so nearly everything in Dana's 26th year is colored by it!

📌 TL;DR SUMMARY OF HER HOROSCOPE:

✨ Personality: It is your "main character" year! Expect a surge of confidence, magnetism, and a fresh wardrobe/glow, while keeping a soft, empathetic Cancer core.

🌍 Life in General: Runs in 3 phases — bold initiation (June–Nov 2026), quiet internal reflection & healing (Dec 2026–Spring 2027 during Jupiter retrograde), and a major external harvest (mid-2027).

💼 Career: High magnetic visibility attracts big opportunities! Lead by empowering and inspiring others. Progress will be steady and rewarding through patience.

❤️ Love: Boosted romantic energy and attractiveness! Deepening emotional intimacy and meaningful connections, especially in the second half of the year.

tabs.label: Personality ✨
tabs.title: This is Her Year to be Seen
tabs.content:
Jupiter on the Leo Ascendant means the planet of abundance and expansion sits directly on her 1st house of identity, body, and personal presence, making her the "main character" for roughly 13 months.

Expect a surge of confidence, magnetism, and vitality — more energy radiating from her, and often a desire to transform her appearance (new hairstyle, wardrobe, a general glow). Cafe Astrology frames the same transit for her Cancer side as heightened optimism and generosity, greeting life with a fresh, can-do attitude where the past matters less than the future.

Her Cancer Sun keeps a tender, intuitive core underneath all that shine — Cancer is ruled by the Moon, making her sensitive, caring, and quick to absorb the emotions around her. So the year's texture is warm Leo visibility wrapped around a soft, feeling Cancer center.

⚠️ Caution: The line between solar confidence and ego inflation requires conscious attention, along with over-expansion (saying yes to everything because it all feels possible) and burnout from constantly being "on."

tabs.label: Life in General 🌍
tabs.title: Three Phases of Transformation
tabs.content:
The arc runs in three distinct phases:

1️⃣ Bold Initiation (June to Nov 2026): A powerful time for taking new leaps and stepping into the spotlight.

2️⃣ Refinement & Internal Development (Dec 12, 2026 into Spring 2027): When Jupiter stations retrograde, it becomes a time to quietly restore confidence, reflect on how authentically she's expressing herself, and lower the curtain for behind-the-scenes work.

3️⃣ The Harvest (Mid-2027): The retrograde ends and the final stretch through mid-2027 brings the external rewards.

For her Cancer side, 2026 is broadly described as a year of emotional maturity, healing, and quiet, steady growth — building solid foundations, with the bigger external payoff arriving in 2027. Saturn's move into Aries activates her career sector for about 2.5 years, so professional responsibility is a growing background theme all year.

tabs.label: Career 💼
tabs.title: Magnetic Opportunities & Leadership
tabs.content:
Jupiter on the Ascendant isn't primarily a "career house" transit, but it works by making her more visible and magnetic, which tends to attract opportunity.

Cafe Astrology's General Guidance: Be proud, confident, generous, and above-board in professional dealings. Take the high road, and lead by inspiring and empowering others rather than grabbing all the spotlight. Leadership shines brightest when she leaves room for others to shine too!

For her Cancer Sun, the career storyline is steady rather than explosive: gradual, consistent progress through diligence, with the first half of a given year often feeling slow and the second half bringing recognition, better relationships with colleagues, and potential promotions.

Saturn in her career sector means responsibility and recognition are genuinely on the horizon, but earned through patience.

💡 Financial Note: One recurring caution across sources is financial care — watch overspending and be discerning about money opportunities.

tabs.label: Love ❤️
tabs.title: Romantic Energy & Deepening Intimacy
tabs.content:
This is one of the more genuinely promising areas! Leo governs romantic love specifically (as distinct from formal partnership), and Jupiter amplifying her Leo placements tends to boost romantic energy, warmth, and attractiveness — others simply find her more compelling.

For her Cancer Sun, 2026 leans introspective and healing in love — favoring authentic emotional intimacy and, in some readings, the return of past lovers or a sense of reviewing what she truly needs to feel secure.

Several sources point to the second half of the year as warmer, with deepening intimacy and rekindled romance, and single Cancers meeting meaningful new connections, often through family or social networks.

🌟 Astro Caveat: Note that Venus retrograde (Oct 3 – Nov 13, 2026) is a "lay low, review, don't make major decisions" window where a lover may seem distant or casual romances stall.

Astrological Note on Sourcing: These results split between two systems. The Jupiter-in-Leo material is Western/tropical astrology (matching sun-moon-rising framing). Several Cancer-year results are Vedic, which uses different sign math. We leaned on Western/tropical to stay consistent with her chart!
